results.title: NON-INVASIVE MEASUREMENT SYSTEM AND METHOD USING SINGLE-SHOT SPECTRAL-DOMAIN INTERFEROMETRIC NEAR-INFRARED SPECTROSCOPY BASED ON ORTHOGONAL DISPERSION
results.abstract: An optical measurement system comprises an optical source configured for generating source light having an optical wavelength spectrum. The optical measurement system compises an interferometer configured for splitting the source light into sample light and reference light. The interferometer is fur

results.title: Reversing camera with rear collision early warning function
results.abstract: The utility model provides a reversing camera with a rear collision early warning function. The reversing camera comprises a lens, a CMOS sensor electrically connected to the lens, a video buffer electrically connected to the CMOS sensor, and a flash module electrically connected to the CMOS sensor.

results.title: Reversing camera with reversing early warning function
results.abstract: The utility model provides a reversing camera with a reversing early warning function. results.title: Folate targeted enhanced tumor and folate receptor positive tissue optical imaging technology
results.abstract: A method of differentiating tumors from healthy cells in tissue is disclosed. The method includes the steps of providing a marker-folate conjugate, placing the marker-folate conjugate in contact with the tissue and viewing the tissue.
